name: opencoven-design
description: Opinionated design constraints for OpenCoven harness cockpits, docs, and agent-built UI — dark-first, minimal, symbolic, with controlled purple and tokenized colors and typography.

interface.shortDescription: Opinionated design constraints for OpenCoven harness cockpits, docs, and agent-built UI — dark-first, minimal, symbolic, with controlled purple and tokenized colors and typography.
interface.longDescription: Design and implement OpenCoven surfaces against DESIGN.md and brand/ui token files, keeping interfaces dark, dense, and symbolic.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use OpenCoven Design Skill safely.
